debug_info.goal:
case right
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
h : MeromorphicOn f ⊤
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖|)
    (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts:
(∀ᵐ x ∂(MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))),
          MeasureTheory.Integrable
            (fun y : ℝ ↦ ‖log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖‖)
            (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)))) := by
      filter_upwards with x
      have z₀ : MeromorphicOn (fun y ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        sorry
      have := intervalIntegrable_log_norm_meromorphicOn (a := 0) (b := 2 * π)
        (f := fun y ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y) z₀
      unfold IntervalIntegrable at this
      simp at this
      unfold MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn at this
      simpa using this.1.norm
    have hbound :
        MeasureTheory.Integrable
          (fun x : ℝ ↦ (2 * π)⁻¹ *
            ∫ y : ℝ in Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖‖)
          (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))) := by

        exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h).norm).1.2
      simpa [MeasureTheory.Integrable, MeasureTheory.AEStronglyMeasurable, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
        mul_comm] using hF.smul ((2 * π)⁻¹ : ℝ)
    have hmain :
        MeasureTheory.Integrable
          (fun x : ℝ ↦ ∫ y : ℝ in Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖‖)
          (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))) := by
      have : (fun x : ℝ ↦ ∫ y : ℝ in Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖‖) =

            ∫ y : ℝ in Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖‖)) := by
        ext x
        have : ((2 * π) : ℝ) * ((2 * π)⁻¹ *

            ∫ y : ℝ in Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖‖ := by

        simpa [smul_eq_mul, mul_assoc] using this.symm
      rw [this]
      simpa using hbound.smul ((2 * π) : ℝ)
    simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg] using hmain

MeasureTheory.Integrable
